headline: Assessing Block (XYZ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Performance And Conflicting Market Narratives
summary: Block stock overview following recent performance Block (XYZ) has drawn fresh attention after a mixed run in recent months, with the share price near US$59.85 and returns varying between the past month, past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for Block. For context, Block’s recent share price momentum has softened, with a 7 day share price return of 8.68% and a 90 day share price return of 7.28%. headline: The bark of Meta's potential layoffs are 'worse than the bite'
summary: Meta (META) is reportedly considering laying off 20% of its staff, according to Reuters. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Wedbush Securities managing director and global head of technology research Dan Ives sit with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss the potential layoffs in the broader context of artificial intelligence (AI)–fueled productivity gains.

content.title: The bark of Meta's potential layoffs are 'worse than the bite'
content.description:
Meta (META) is reportedly considering laying off 20% of its staff, according to Reuters.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Wedbush Securities managing director and global head of technology research Dan Ives sit with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss the potential layoffs in the broader context of artificial intelligence (AI)–fueled productivity gains.
